coreJoins: Erp.JobOper -> Erp.JobAsmbl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
Erp.OpMaster -> Erp.JobOpDtl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum + OprSeq

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT month(A.Date01) ,     
       sum(CASE a.OpComplete WHEN '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 end)  AS wgl,
       sum(CASE a.OpComplete WHEN '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 end)  AS wwgl,
       count(a.OpComplete) AS zl
                   from JobOper A
       LEFT JOIN erp.JobAsmbl A3 ON (A.JobNum=A3.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=A3.AssemblySeq AND A.Company=A3.Company) 
	   LEFT JOIN erp.JobHead B ON (A.JobNum=B.JobNum AND A.Company=B.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.OpMaster C ON (A.OpCode=C.OpCode AND A.Company=C.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.JobOpDtl D ON (A.JobNum=D.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=D.AssemblySeq AND A.OprSeq=D.OprSeq AND A.Company=D.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.ResourceGroup E ON (D.ResourceGrpID=E.ResourceGrpID AND D.Company=E.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.LaborDtl f ON (f.JobNum= a.JobNum AND f.AssemblySeq = a.AssemblySeq AND f.OprSeq= a.OprSeq AND f.Company = a.company)
       LEFT JOIN erp.EmpBasic AS g
ON g.EmpID = f.EmployeeNum AND g.Company = f.Company
       wHERE A.Company ='jctimes'  and year(a.date01) =year(getdate())and month(a.date01)<=month(getdate()) and month(a.date01)>=month(getdate())-2 and a.checkbox01 = 0 AND A.OpCode IN('820')
GROUP BY month(A.Date01)

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT A.JobNum ,A.AssemblySeq ,A.OprSeq ,a.ActProdHours,B.PartNum ,B.PartDescription ,B.ReqDueDate,A.Date20,A.CommentText,A.OpCode ,C.OpDesc ,D.ResourceGrpID,E.Description 
       ,Case when A.Number10=0 then '99' else CASe WHEN  A.Number10<10 THEN '0'+ cast(Ceiling(A.Number10) AS Nvarchar) ELSE cast(Ceiling(A.Number10) AS Nvarchar) End end as Number09,
       A3.PartNum as nPartNum,A3.Description as nDescription,A.Character09,A.OpComplete,A.Date01,A.Date02,A.ProdStandard,a.ActProdHours,
       convert(nvarchar(10),A.date20 ,120)+ ' ' +a.Character09 AS jsdate ,g.name,
       convert(nvarchar(10),f.clockindate ,120)+ ' ' +f.DspClockInTime AS indate ,
       convert(nvarchar(10),f.ApprovedDate ,120)+ ' ' +f.DspClockOutTime AS outdate 
                     from JobOper A
       LEFT JOIN erp.JobAsmbl A3 ON (A.JobNum=A3.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=A3.AssemblySeq AND A.Company=A3.Company) 
	   LEFT JOIN erp.JobHead B ON (A.JobNum=B.JobNum AND A.Company=B.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.OpMaster C ON (A.OpCode=C.OpCode AND A.Company=C.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.JobOpDtl D ON (A.JobNum=D.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=D.AssemblySeq AND A.OprSeq=D.OprSeq AND A.Company=D.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.ResourceGroup E ON (D.ResourceGrpID=E.ResourceGrpID AND D.Company=E.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.LaborDtl f ON (f.JobNum= a.JobNum AND f.AssemblySeq = a.AssemblySeq AND f.OprSeq= a.OprSeq AND f.Company = a.company)
       LEFT JOIN erp.EmpBasic AS g
ON g.EmpID = f.EmployeeNum AND g.Company = f.Company
wHERE A.Company ='jctimes'  and a.checkbox01 = 0 and a.date01 >=(getdate()-1) 
       and a.date01 <(getdate()+3)
 --and b.prodcode not in ('091031','404','YF01')
 -- and b.PartNum not in (select PartNum from part where Character06 =N'涂布')
${if (len(资源部门)==0,"","and C.OpDesc = N'"+资源部门+"'")}

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT a.OrderDate,a.PONum,a.Approve,a.OpenOrder,VendorID,a.Character01 as fqr,b.poline,b.Character01 as cpbh,b.ium,
b.PartNum,b.LineDesc,b.Character01,b.XOrderQty,b.openLine,c.Name AS gys,d.Name AS cgy ,e.DueDate ,e.OpenRelease ,
f.ReceivedComplete,f.ReceiptDate,f.Invoiced,f.WareHouseCode,f.OurQty,f.BinNum,f.ReceivedComplete,g.EntryPerson
FROM POHeader a
LEFT JOIN PODetail b ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.PONum = b.PONUM)
LEFT JOIN erp.PORel e  ON (b.Company = e.Company AND b.POLine = e.POLine AND b.PONUM = e.PONum)
LEFT JOIN erp.Vendor c ON (a.VendorNum = c.VendorNum AND c.Company = a.Company)
LEFT JOIN erp.PurAgent d ON (d.BuyerID= a.BuyerID AND d.Company = a.Company )
inner join  erp.RcvDtl f ON (f.Company = b.Company AND f.PONum = b.PONUM AND f.POLine= b.POLine)
LEFT JOIN Erp.RcvHead g ON (g.Company = f.Company AND g.PackSlip = f.PackSlip AND g.VendorNum= f.VendorNum AND g.PurPoint = f.PurPoint)
WHERE a.Company ='jytimes' AND a.OrderDate >='2020-7-1' AND a.Approve ='1'and d.name not in ('段冬梅','懂君君','孙佳盼') 
and a.Character01 not in('精一新材料','何金伟')

  ${if (len(收货日期起)==0,"","and f.ReceiptDate>='"+收货日期起+"'")}
    ${if (len(收货日期止)==0,"","and f.ReceiptDate<='"+收货日期止+"'")}
      ${if (len(供应商)==0,"","and c.name Like N'%"+供应商+"%'")}
      ${if (len(收货人)==0,"","and g.EntryPerson='"+收货人+"'")}
       ${if (len(采购单号)==0,"","and a.PONum='"+采购单号+"'")}
      
order by  e.duedate asc

coreJoins: Erp.PartTran -> Erp.PODetail ON Company + POLine + PONum

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
--采购明细查询
select TranDate 交易时间,SysDate 操作时间,TranType 交易类型,JobNum 工单号,
--ActTranQty 数量,ActTransUOM 单位,
TranQty 数量,UM 单位,p.EntryPerson 操作人
,p.ExtCost 金额,p.PartNum 物料号,p.PartDescription 物料描述 ,TranNum 交易号,packslip 入库单号,packnum 出库单号,p.PONum PO号,
--InvAdjReason 原因代码,
--MtlUnitCost 物料单位成本,SubUnitCost 外包单位成本,LbrUnitCost 人工单位成本,BurUnitCost 间接单位成本,
p.OrderNum 订单号,TranReference 备注
,c.Name 供应商
,d.Name 采购员
,b.CommentText 备注1
,b.Character01 产品编码
,b.OrderQty 供应商数量
,b.PUM 供应商单位
,b.XOrderQty 我方数量
,b.IUM 我方单位
,c.TaxRegionCode 供应商税率
,isnull(nullif(b.DocInUnitCost,0),b.DocUnitCost) 含税单价
--,e.ProdCode,e.ClassID,e.MtlAnalysisCode
,f.Description 群组,g.Description 类别,h.Description 细分
,i.Description 半成品分析 
,c.Name+'--'+p.PartNum+'--'+p.PartDescription 辅助列
,p.PartNum+'--'+p.PartDescription 辅助列相同物料不同供应商
--,cast(year(TranDate) as nvarchar)+N'年'+cast(MONTH(TranDate) as nvarchar)+N'月' 年月
--,cast(year(TranDate) as varchar)+right('0'+cast(MONTH(TranDate) as varchar),2) 年月数字
--,case when TranQty<>0 then p.ExtCost/TranQty else null end 单价
from erp.parttran p
left join PODetail b on p.Company=b.Company and p.PONum=b.PONum and p.POLine=b.POLine
left join POHeader a on a.PONum=b.PONUM and a.Company=b.Company
left join erp.Vendor c on c.VendorNum=a.VendorNum and a.Company=c.Company
left join erp.PurAgent d on d.BuyerID=a.BuyerID and a.Company=d.Company
left join erp.part e on e.Company = p.Company and e.PartNum=p.PartNum
left join erp.ProdGrup f on f.Company = e.Company and f.ProdCode = e.ProdCode
left join erp.PartClass g on g.Company = e.Company and g.ClassID = e.ClassID
left join erp.AnalysisCd h on h.Company = e.Company and h.AnalysisCode = e.MtlAnalysisCode
left join erp.AnalysisCd i on e.AnalysisCode=i.AnalysisCode and e.Company=i.Company
where  a.company='jctimes'and trantype in ('PUR-STK','PUR-INS') --and p.PartDescription LIKE N'45#方钢%'
and TranDate>='2024-10-01' 
${if (len(交易开始时间)==0,""," and TranDate >=cast('"+交易开始时间+"'+'-01' as date)")}
${if (len(交易结束时间)==0,"","  and TranDate <=DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(MONTH, 1, '"+交易结束时间+"'+'-01'))")}
${if (len(物料号)==0,""," and p.PartNum ='"+物料号+"'")}

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT
case when h.Description IS NULL   then '未派发'
else h.Description end as 'fx',

      count(A3.Description) as nDescription

       FROM PUB.JobHead b
       LEFT JOIN PUB.JobOper a ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.JobNum = b.JobNum)
       LEFT JOIN PUB.JobAsmbl A3 ON (A.JobNum=A3.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=A3.AssemblySeq AND A.Company=A3.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN PUB.OpMaster C ON (A.OpCode=C.OpCode AND A.Company=C.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN PUB.JobOpDtl D ON (A.JobNum=D.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=D.AssemblySeq AND A.OprSeq=D.OprSeq AND A.Company=D.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN PUB.ResourceGroup E ON (D.ResourceGrpID=E.ResourceGrpID AND D.Company=E.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN PUB."Resource" h ON (d.ResourceID = h.ResourceID AND D.Company=h.Company)
       LEFT JOIN PUB.LaborDtl f ON (f.JobNum= a.JobNum AND f.AssemblySeq = a.AssemblySeq AND f.OprSeq= a.OprSeq AND f.Company = a.company)
       LEFT JOIN PUB.EmpBasic AS g
ON g.EmpID = f.EmployeeNum AND g.Company = f.Company
WHERE b.Company ='jctimes' AND b.ReqDueDate >='2020-1-1' AND a.Date20>='2020-2-1'
 AND A.OpComplete<>1   and a.opcode='wb'
GROUP BY case when h.Description IS NULL   then '未派发'
else h.Description end
order by b.ReqDueDate

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
Select    f.Description,a.partdescription,c.OpDesc,count((c.OpCode)) sl,sum(c.ProdStandard)/count(c.OpCode) AS jhgs,sum(d.LaborHrs)/count(c.OpCode) AS jggs
from  JobOper As c
left join erp.JobAsmbl As b
on c.jobNum = b.jobNum  AND c.AssemblySeq = b.AssemblySeq AND c.Company = b.Company
left join erp.JobHead As a 
on  c.jobNum = a.jobnum AND c.company = a.company
INNER join erp.ProdGrup AS a1 ON a1.company=a.Company AND a1.ProdCode=a.ProdCode
LEFT JOIN erp.LaborDtl AS d
ON c.JobNum = d.JobNum AND c.AssemblySeq =d.AssemblySeq AND c.OprSeq =d.OprSeq AND c.Company= d.Company
left JOIN  erp."Resource" AS e 
ON e.ResourceID = d.ResourceID and e.Company = d.Company
LEFT JOIN erp.ResourceGroup AS f
ON f.ResourceGrpID = e.ResourceGrpID and f.Company = e.Company
LEFT JOIN erp.EmpBasic AS h 
ON h.EmpID = d.EmployeeNum  AND h.Company = d.Company
where c.Company = 'jctimes' and d.approveddate>='2023-01-01'AND a.JobCode ='1'AND d.JCDept IN ('ZPCJ')
and a.prodcode = '091031'
AND c.JobNum NOT LIKE '%w%'
GROUP BY f.Description,a.partdescription,c.OpDesc
ORDER BY a.partdescription,f.Description,c.OpDesc

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT a.packslip,a.ponum,a.jobnum,a.PartNum,a.TranDate ,a.TranQty,a.trantype ,a.WareHouseCode, a.PartDescription,a.WareHouse2,a.ActTranQty,a.trannum,a.binnum,
a.entryperson,a.InvAdjReason,a.PoNum,a.poline,a.jobnum,a.tranreference,a.ordernum,a.orderline,c.Description AS pdesc,e.description AS cdesc,
case
WHEN a.TranType = 'PUR-STK' AND a.TranQty >0 THEN 'rk' 
WHEN a.TranType = 'INS-STK' AND a.TranQty >0 THEN 'rk' 
WHEN a.TranType = 'STK-MTL' AND a.TranQty <0 THEN 'rk' 
WHEN a.TranType = 'STK-STK' AND a.TranQty >0 THEN 'rk' 
WHEN a.TranType = 'DMR-STK' AND a.TranQty >0 THEN 'rk' 
WHEN a.TranType = 'PUR-STK' AND a.TranQty <0 THEN 'ck' 
WHEN a.TranType = 'STK-STK' AND a.TranQty <0 THEN 'ck' 
WHEN a.TranType = 'STK-MTL' AND a.TranQty >0 THEN 'ck' 
WHEN a.TranType = 'STK-ASM' AND a.TranQty >0 THEN 'ck' 
WHEN a.TranType = 'ADJ-QTY' and a.TranQty >0  THEN 'rdz'
WHEN a.TranType = 'ADJ-QTY' and a.TranQty <0  THEN 'cdz' 
WHEN a.TranType = 'STK-UKN'  THEN 'ck' 
WHEN a.TranType = 'STK-CUS'  THEN 'ck' 
ELSE 'qt' END AS fxtype ,b.ProdCode,f.Invoiced,f.InvoiceNum
FROM erp.PartTran AS a
LEFT JOIN erp.Part AS b
ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.PartNum = b.PartNum)
left join erp.PartWhse d on (d.WarehouseCode = a.WarehouseCode  and d.Company = a.Company and a.PartNum= d.PartNum)
LEFT JOIN Erp.ProdGrup c ON (b.Company = c.company AND B.ProdCode = c.prodcode)
LEFT JOIN erp.PartClass e ON (b.Company = e.Company AND B.ClassID= e.ClassID)
LEFT JOIN Erp.Rcvdtl f ON (a.Company = f.Company AND a.PONum= f.PONum AND a.PackSlip = f.PackSlip AND a.POLine = f.POLine)
WHERE a.Company ='jctimes' AND a.trandate>'2021-1-1'
AND a.TranType NOT IN ('adj-cst','pur-ins','ins-dmr')
and B.TypeCode NOT IN ('K')
AND A.PartNum NOT IN ('0906010001','0906010002')
and a.WareHouseCode in ('pjc001') AND a.BinNum IN ('dz001')

order by a.trandate

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
SELECT A.CheckBox18,A.CheckBox19,A.Date20,A.Date19,A.OrderNum,A.PartNum,A.LineDesc,A.SalesUM,A.OrderQty,isnull(G.Qty1,0) AS qty1,
isnull(G.qty2,0) AS Qty2,isnull(G.qty3,0) AS Qty3,
A.OrderComment,C.EntryPerson,E.Name,
E.Address1+E.Address2+E.Address3 AS Address,F.PhoneNum,F.CellPhoneNum,F.FaxNum,F.Name AS cname,A.Date17,A.Character09,A.OrderLine,
D.Country,A.Character10,A.shortChar10,A.ShipComment,aa.JobNum
FROM OrderDtl A 
LEFT JOIN erp.JobProd aa ON (a.Company = aa.Company AND A.OrderNum = aa.OrderNum AND A.OrderLine = aa.OrderLine)
LEFT JOIN erp.OrderRel B ON (A.Company=B.Company AND A.OrderNum=B.OrderNum AND A.OrderLine=B.OrderLine) 
LEFT JOIN OrderHed C ON (B.Company=C.Company AND B.OrderNum=C.OrderNum) 
LEFT JOIN erp.Customer D ON (C.Company=D.Company AND C.CustNum=D.CustNum) 
LEFT JOIN erp.ShipTo E ON (D.CustNum=E.CustNum AND D.Company=E.Company AND B.ShipToNum=E.ShipToNum) 
LEFT JOIN erp.CustCnt F ON (F.Company=E.Company AND F.CustNum=E.CustNum AND F.ShipToNum=E.ShipToNum AND B.ShpConNum=F.ConNum) 
LEFT JOIN ( 
SELECT A1.Company, 
A1.PartNum, 
sum(CASE WHEN A1.WarehouseCode='cpc001' THEN A1.OnHandQty ELSE 0 END) AS qty1,
sum(CASE WHEN A1.WarehouseCode='cpc002' THEN A1.OnHandQty ELSE 0 END) AS qty2,
sum(CASE WHEN A1.WarehouseCode='ysc' THEN A1.OnHandQty ELSE 0 END) AS qty3
FROM erp.PartWhse A1 
WHERE A1.WarehouseCode IN ('cpc001','cpc002','ysc') AND A1.Company='jctimes'
Group By A1.Company,A1.PartNum 
) G ON (A.PartNum=G.PartNum AND A.Company=G.Company)
WHERE A.Company='jctimes' AND B.OpenRelease=1 AND A.KitCompOrigSeq=0 AND A.CheckBox20=1 AND a.prodcode LIKE '%0910%'
order by A.SHORTCHAR10 desc

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
declare @a varchar(20)='2025-01-01'
declare @b varchar(20)='2025-12-21'

--- -isnull(m.days,0) 补充排除采购延期导致的传动，控制系统延期
	select a.Company,a.OrderNum,b.OrderLine,b.PartNum,a.EntryPerson,b.SalesCatID,b.Character03,a.OrderDate,b.RequestDate
	,b.LineDesc,b.OrderQty,j.Description 销售类型,h.ProdCode,i.Description 群组,u.Name,h.ClassID,c.JobNum
	into #AAA
	from OrderHed a 
	inner join OrderDtl b on a.Company=b.Company and a.OrderNum=b.OrderNum
	left join erp.JobProd c on c.Company=a.Company and c.OrderNum=a.OrderNum and c.OrderLine=B.OrderLine
	inner join erp.Part h on a.Company=h.Company and b.PartNum=h.PartNum
	inner join erp.ProdGrup i on i.Company = h.Company and h.ProdCode=i.ProdCode
	inner join erp.SalesCat j on j.Company=a.Company and j.SalesCatID=b.SalesCatID
	inner join erp.OrderRel g on  g.Company=a.Company and g.OrderNum=a.OrderNum and g.OrderLine=b.OrderLine
	inner join erp.UserComp u on u.Company=a.Company and u.DcdUserID=a.EntryPerson
	where --(convert(varchar(10),b.RequestDate,120) >=@a and  convert(varchar(10),b.RequestDate,120) <=@b)
	 b.RequestDate>= @a and b.RequestDate<= @b
	and  a.Character03 not  in (N'取消',N'暂停' )
	and a.Company = 'jctimes' 
	and b.PartNum not like '%-100'
	and h.ProdCode not in ('P501','401','402','403','404','0905','YF01','0910','091020','091031','090101','091001')
	and h.ClassID not in ('0921','0922','0924','0925')

select  a.OrderNum,a.OrderLine,a.PartNum,a.LineDesc,a.Name
,a.OrderQty,d.JobNum
,a.ProdCode,a. 群组
,case when a.群组 in (N'平模头',N'圆模头',N'涂布模头') then a.群组 else N'配件' end as 分类
,case when d.JobCode = '1' then N'总厂' when d.JobCode = '2'  then N'澄江' end as 厂区
,a.销售类型
,1 as 总数量
,case when isnull(k.OpComplete, d.JobComplete)=1  then 1 else  isnull(l.jd,0) end as 工序进度
,case when isnull(k.OpComplete, d.JobComplete)=1 OR d.JobComplete = 1 then N'已完工' else N'未完工' end as 完工状态
,case when d.JobClosed=1   then N'已入库' else N'未入库' end as 入库状态
,case when isnull(k.OpComplete, d.JobComplete)=1  then 1 else 0 end as 完工数量
,case when datediff(day,a.RequestDate,case when isnull(k.OpComplete, d.JobComplete)=1 OR d.JobComplete = 1  then isnull(isnull(k1.Date19,d.JobCompletionDate) ,getdate()) else getdate() end )-isnull(m.days,0) >0 then N'延期' else N'' end as 延期状态
,case when datediff(day,a.RequestDate,case when isnull(k.OpComplete, d.JobComplete)=1 OR d.JobComplete = 1  then isnull(isnull(k1.Date19,d.JobCompletionDate) ,getdate()) else getdate() end )-isnull(m.days,0) >0 then  1 else 0 end as 延期数量
,case when isnull(k.OpComplete, d.JobComplete)=1 and datediff(day,a.RequestDate,isnull(isnull(k1.Date19,d.JobCompletionDate) ,getdate()))-isnull(m.days,0) >0 
	then  1 else 0 end as 延期完工数量
,a.RequestDate
,isnull(k1.Date19,d.JobCompletionDate) as JobCompletionDate
,k1.Date19  最新报工时间
,f.ShipDate
,case when datediff(day,a.RequestDate,isnull(isnull(k1.Date19,d.JobCompletionDate) ,getdate())) -isnull(m.days,0)>0 
	then datediff(day,a.RequestDate,isnull(isnull(k1.Date19,d.JobCompletionDate) ,getdate()))-isnull(m.days,0) else 0 end as 延期天数
,a.OrderDate as 订单日期
,m.days
,convert(varchar(7),a.RequestDate,120) 月份
into #a
from #AAA a
left join erp.JobProd c on c.Company=a.Company and c.OrderNum=a.OrderNum and c.OrderLine=a.OrderLine
inner join erp.JobHead d on d.Company=c.Company and c.JobNum=d.JobNum
left join (  ----模体最后一道工序为质检工序，报工完成说明已完工
	select Company,JobNum,OpComplete,OpCode
	,row_number() over(partition by Company,JobNum order by oprseq desc) No 
	from JobOper 
	where   CheckBox01=0  and AssemblySeq=0  and LaborEntryMethod='T'
	and JobNum in ( select JobNum FROM #AAA )
) k on a.Company = a.Company and d.JobNum = k.JobNum and k.No=1 and k.OpCode in ('820','CJ-ZJ') 
left join ( --模体最新完工时间
	select Company,JobNum,max(Date19) Date19 
	from JobOper 
	where  AssemblySeq=0  and CheckBox01=0   and LaborEntryMethod='T'
	group by Company,JobNum
) k1 on a.Company = a.Company and d.JobNum = k1.JobNum and k1.Company='jctimes' 
left join (
    select a.Company,b.OrderNum,b.OrderLine,max(a.ShipDate) as ShipDate
    from erp.ShipHead a
    inner join erp.ShipDtl b on a.Company=b.Company and a.PackNum=b.PackNum
    group by  a.Company,b.OrderNum,b.OrderLine
) f on f.Company=a.Company and f.OrderNum=a.OrderNum and f.OrderLine=a.OrderLine
left join (
	select Company,JobNum, sum(QtyCompleted*ProdStandard)*1.00/sum(RunQty*ProdStandard)  as jd
	from JobOper
	where RunQty>0 and ProdStandard>0 and LaborEntryMethod='T' and CheckBox01=0
	group by  Company,JobNum
) l on l.Company=d.Company and l.JobNum=d.JobNum
left join (
	 select a.JobNum  ,max(datediff(day,c.DueDate,isnull(d.ReceiptDate,getdate())))  days
	 --,a.PartNum 产品,a.PartDescription 描述,a.CreateDate 创建日期,a.JobClosed 工单状态,b.MtlPartNum 原料,c.LineDesc
	 --,c.PONUM 采购订单,c.POLine 行,c.Character01,c.DueDate 到期日,d.ReceiptDate 最新收货日期
	 --,datediff(day,c.DueDate,isnull(d.ReceiptDate,getdate())) 延期天数
	 from  erp.JobHead a 
	 inner join erp.partmtl b on a.PartNum=b.PartNum
	 inner join PODetail c on c.PartNum=b.MtlPartNum and charindex(c.Character01,b.PartNum)>0
	 left join (
		select PONum,POLine,Company,max(ReceiptDate) ReceiptDate
		from erp.RcvDtl
		group by PONum,POLine,Company
	 ) d on d.Company=c.Company and d.PONum=c.PONUM and d.POLine=c.POLine
	 where a.company ='jctimes' and a.CreateDate>='2024-01-01' and datediff(day,c.DueDate,isnull(d.ReceiptDate,getdate()))>0
	 and (a.PartDescription like N'%传动系统%' or right(a.PartNum,4) in ('%-097','%-098') 
	  or a.PartDescription like N'%控制系统%' or right(a.PartNum,4) in ('%-097','%-098'))
	--  order by a.PartNum,a.PartDescription
	group by a.JobNum
) m on m.JobNum=d.JobNum
where 1=1  and a.Company = 'jctimes' 
and  d.JobCode = '2'
and a.PartNum not like '%-100'
and a.ProdCode not in ('P501','401','402','403','404','0905','YF01','0910','091020','091031','090101','091001')
and a.ClassID not in ('0921','0922','0924','0925')
 and d.JobNum NOT LIKE '%w%'
order by  a.OrderNum,a.OrderLine

 select 月份,sum(总数量)总数量,sum(延期数量)延期数量,sum(完工数量) 完工数量,sum(case when 完工状态=N'已完工' and 延期状态<>N'延期' then 1 else 0 end )已完工未延期数量
from #a
group by 月份
order by 月份

DROP TABLE #a
DROP TABLE #AAA

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
declare @Company nvarchar(100),
@begindate datetime,
@enddate datetime
set @Company='jctimes'
set @begindate='2023-07-01'
set @enddate='2023-07-01'
${if (len(开始时间)==0,""," set @begindate ='"+开始时间+"'")}
${if (len(结束时间)==0,""," set @enddate ='"+结束时间+"'")}
 
select ttttt.*,(ttttt.[期末在制成本（物料）]A+ttttt.[期末在制成本（人工）]A+ttttt.[期末在制成本（制费）]A+ttttt.[期末在制成本（外包）]A) as '期末总在制成本' 
,(ttttt.[期末在制成本（物料）]A+ttttt.[期末在制成本（人工）]A+ttttt.[期末在制成本（制费）]A+ttttt.[期末在制成本（外包）]A
-ttttt.[期初在制成本（人工）]A-ttttt.[期初在制成本（外包）]A-ttttt.[期初在制成本（物料）]A-ttttt.[期初在制成本（制费）]A
-ttttt.本月分摊人工成本-ttttt.本月分摊制费成本
+ttttt.[关闭待结成本（人工）]A+ttttt.[关闭待结成本（物料）]A+ttttt.[关闭待结成本（外包）]A+ttttt.[关闭待结成本（制费）]A) as '本月发生额'
from (
SELECT  str(ROW_NUMBER()  Over (ORDER BY qm.company,qm.jobnum))  as '行号'
                                 ,case qm.CalcFlag when '0' then N'待计算' when 1 then N'已计算' when '-1' then N'本次不参加计算' end '物料计算标记'
                                 ,case qm.CalcFlag2 when '0' then N'待计算' when 1 then N'已计算' when '-1' then N'本次不参加计算' end '人工/制费/外包计算标记'
                                 ,REPLACE(str(qm.YEAR),' ','')+'-'+ REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','') '年月'
								 ,qm.Year '年'
								 ,qm.Month '月'
                                 ,qm.jobnum '工单号'
								 ,jh.ProdCode '群组',jh.RevisionNum '版本',jh.CreateDate '创建日期'
								 ,pg.Description '群组描述'
								 ,isnull(qm.ContratNum,'') as '合同号'
								 ,isnull(qm.SONum,0) as 'SO'
                                 ,'''' + qm.PartNum '物料编码'
                                 ,qm.PartDescription '物料描述'
								 ,pc.Description '类别描述'
                                 ,jh.ProdQty '工单数量'
								 ,mf1.wcQTY '完成数量'
                                 ,case when closeddate is null then '' else cast(closeddate as varchar(10)) end '关闭日期'
								  ,case when jh.JobCompletionDate is null then '' else cast(jh.JobCompletionDate as varchar(10)) end '完成日期'
								  ,jh.JobClosed '工单关闭'
								  ,jh.JobComplete '工单完成'
                                 ,qm.GuanBiDaiJie '关闭待结'
                                 ,qm.PriorMtlCostInWip '期初在制成本（物料）'
                                 ,qm.PriorLaborCostInWip '期初在制成本（人工）'
                                 ,qm.PriorBurCostInWip '期初在制成本（制费）'
                                 ,qm.PriorSubCostInWip '期初在制成本（外包）'
                                 ,qm.PriorQtyInWip '期初工时在制约当量'
                                 ,qm.PriorQtymtlInWip '期初物料在制约当量'
                                 ,qm.PriorQtysubInWip '期初外包在制约当量'
                                 ,qm.MtlExtCost '当月单套标准物料成本'
								 ,qm.LaborExtCost '当月单套标准人工成本'
								 ,qm.BurExtCost '当月单套标准制费成本'
								 ,qm.SubExtCost '当月单套标准外包成本'
                                 ,case when qm.WipReceivedQty_all<>0 then (qm.WipReceivedMtlCost_all+qm.WipReceivedLaborCost_all+qm.WipReceivedBurCost_all+qm.WipReceivedSubCost_all)/qm.WipReceivedQty_all else case when qm.qtyinwip<>0 then (qm.MtlCostInWip+LaborCostInWip+BurCostInWip+SubCostInWip)/QtyInWip else 0 end end  '当月产成品单套总成本'
                                 ,qm.MtlCostIssued '本月发料成本（物料）'
                                 ,qm.LaborCostIssued '本月发料成本（人工）'
                                 ,qm.BurCostIssued '本月发料成本（制费）'
                                 ,qm.SubCostIssued '本月发料成本（外包）'
                                 ,qm.TotalEstProdHours '工单单位标准工时'
								 ,bg.bggs '本月报工标准工时'  -- 本月报工工时》》  本月报工标准工时
                                 ,qm.LaborCostFenTan '本月分摊人工成本'
								 ,qm.ProdHours*rate.LaborRate  '总厂分摊人工'
								 ,qm.ProdLbHours*rate.LaborRate2 '分厂分摊人工'
                                 ,qm.BurCostFenTan '本月分摊制费成本'
								 ,qm.ProdHours*rate.BurRate1  '总厂分摊制费'
								  ,qm.ProdLbHours*rate.BurRate2 '分厂分摊制费'
                                 ,qm.SubReceiptCost '本月外包工序收货成本'
								 ,qm.ProdHours '总厂工时'
								 ,qm.ProdLbHours '分厂工时'
								 ,rate.BurRate1 '总厂制费费率'
								 ,rate.BurRate2 '分厂制费费率'
								 ,rate.LaborRate '总厂人工费率'
								 ,rate.LaborRate2 '分厂人工费率'
                                 ,qm.QtyIssued '本月工时在制约当量'
                                 ,qm.QtymtlIssued '本月物料在制约当量'
                                 ,qm.QtysubIssued '本月外包在制约当量'
                                ,qm.WipReceivedQty_all '本月产成品入库数量'
                                 ,qm.WipReceivedMtlCost_all '本月产成品入库成本（物料）'
                                 ,qm.WipReceivedLaborCost_all '本月产成品入库成本(人工)'
                                 ,qm.WipReceivedBurCost_all '本月产成品入库成本(制费)'
                                 ,qm.WipReceivedSubCost_all '本月产成品入库成本（外包)'
								  ,qm.WipReceivedMtlCost_all+qm.WipReceivedLaborCost_all+qm.WipReceivedBurCost_all+qm.WipReceivedSubCost_all '本月产成品入库总成本'
                                ,qm.qtyAssembly AS '本月次半成品入库数量'
                                ,qm.MtlCostAssembly AS  '本月次半成品入库成本（物料）' 
                                ,qm.LaborCostAssembly AS  '本月次半成品入库成本(人工)'
                                ,qm.BurCostAssembly AS  '本月次半成品入库成本(制费)'
                                ,qm.SubCostAssembly AS  '本月次半成品入库成本（外包)'

                                  ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=1 then 0 else qm.MtlCostInWip end '期末在制成本（物料）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=1 then 0 else qm.LaborCostInWip end '期末在制成本（人工）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=1 then 0 else qm.BurCostInWip end '期末在制成本（制费）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=1 then 0 else qm.SubCostInWip end '期末在制成本（外包）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=1 then 0 else qm.QtyInWip end '期末工时在制约当量'
				,case when GuanBiDaiJie=0 then 0 else qm.MtlCostInWip end '关闭待结成本（物料）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=0 then 0 else qm.LaborCostInWip end '关闭待结成本（人工）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=0 then 0 else qm.BurCostInWip end '关闭待结成本（制费）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=0 then 0 else qm.SubCostInWip end '关闭待结成本（外包）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=0 then 0 else qm.QtyInWip end '关闭待结约当量'                               
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=1 then 0 else qm.QtymtlInWip end '期末物料在制约当量'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=1 then 0 else qm.QtysubInWip end '期末外包在制约当量'
                               ,case when jh.JobClosed=1 then mf.MFDate  else NULL end  as '最后入库日期'
							   ,od.mprice,h.CurrencyCode 
                        FROM dbo.QiMoJob qm
                        LEFT JOIN  ERP.JOBHEAD jh on jh.company=qm.company and jh.jobnum=qm.jobnum 
						left join 
								(select Company,JobNum,max(trandate) as MFDate
								from erp.PartTran
								where TranType in ('mfg-stk','mfg-cus') 
								group by Company,JobNum)mf on qm.Company=mf.Company and qm.JobNum=mf.JobNum
						left join 
								(select Company,JobNum,sum(TranQty) as wcQTY
								from erp.PartTran
								where TranType in ('mfg-stk','mfg-cus')  and AssemblySeq=0
								group by Company,JobNum)mf1 on qm.Company=mf1.Company and qm.JobNum=mf1.JobNum
						left join erp.part part on part.PartNum=qm.PartNum and qm.Company=part.Company
						left join erp.PartClass pc on pc.Company=qm.Company and part.ClassID=pc.ClassID
						left join erp.ProdGrup pg on jh.company=pg.company and jh.ProdCode=pg.ProdCode  
						left join (select lb.company,lb.jobnum,sum(case when (isnull(jo.RunQty,0)*isnull(jo.EstProdHours,0))=0 then 0 else
				isnull(LaborQty,0)/isnull(jo.RunQty,0)*isnull(jo.EstProdHours,0) end) bggs from erp.labordtl lb left join joboper jo on lb.company=jo.company and  lb.JobNum=jo.JobNum and lb.Company=jo.Company
				and lb.AssemblySeq=jo.AssemblySeq and lb.OprSeq=jo.OprSeq where
				CONVERT(VARCHAR(7),PayrollDate,120)>=CONVERT(VARCHAR(7),@begindate,120) and
				 CONVERT(VARCHAR(7),PayrollDate,120)<=CONVERT(VARCHAR(7),@enddate,120)
			
				  group by lb.company,lb.jobnum) bg on 
						qm.company=bg.company and qm.jobnum=bg.jobnum 
				left join qimorate rate on qm.company=rate.company and qm.year=rate.year and qm.month=rate.month 
				left join (select max(ordernum) as modn,company,partnum,RevisionNum from orderdtl group by company,partnum,RevisionNum ) odn on qm.company=odn.company and qm.partnum=odn.partnum and jh.RevisionNum=odn.RevisionNum  
			left join (select company,ordernum,partnum,RevisionNum,max(docunitprice) as mprice from erp.orderdtl group by company,ordernum,partnum,RevisionNum) od on odn.company=od.company and odn.modn=od.ordernum and odn.partnum=od.partnum and odn.RevisionNum=od.RevisionNum  
			left join erp.orderhed h on od.company=h.company and od.ordernum=h.ordernum 
                        WHERE qm.company=@Company    
                        AND  REPLACE(str(qm.YEAR),' ','')+'-'+(case when REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','')<10 then '0'+REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','') else REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','') end )  >=convert(varchar(7),@begindate,120) 
                        AND   REPLACE(str(qm.YEAR),' ','')+'-'+(case when REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','')<10 then '0'+REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','') else REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','') end )<=convert(varchar(7),@enddate,120)   and jh.jobtype='mfg'
                        union all
                        SELECT ltrim(str(ROW_NUMBER()  Over(ORDER BY qm.company, qm.jobnum)))+N' - 未参与运算'  as '行号'
                                 ,case qm.CalcFlag when '0' then N'待计算' when 1 then N'已计算' when '-1' then N'本次不参加计算' end '物料计算标记'
                                 ,case qm.CalcFlag2 when '0' then N'待计算' when 1 then N'已计算' when '-1' then N'本次不参加计算' end '人工/制费/外包计算标记'
                                 ,REPLACE(str(qm.YEAR),' ','')+'-'+ REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','') '年月'
								 ,qm.Year '年'
								 ,qm.Month '月'
                                 ,qm.jobnum '工单号'
								 ,jh.ProdCode '群组',jh.RevisionNum '版本',jh.CreateDate '创建日期'
								 ,pg.Description '群组描述'
								 ,isnull(qm.ContratNum,'') as '合同号'
								 ,isnull(qm.SONum,0) as 'SO'
                                 ,'''' + qm.PartNum '物料编码'
                                 ,qm.PartDescription '物料描述'
								 ,pc.Description '类别描述'
                                 ,jh.ProdQty '工单数量'
								 ,mf1.wcQty '完成数量'
                                 ,case when closeddate is null then '' else cast(closeddate as varchar(10)) end '关闭日期'
								  ,case when jh.JobCompletionDate is null then '' else cast(jh.JobCompletionDate as varchar(10)) end '完成日期'
								    ,jh.JobClosed '工单关闭'
								  ,jh.JobComplete '工单完成'
                                 ,qm.GuanBiDaiJie '关闭待结'

								 ,qm.ProdHours*rate.BurRate1  '总厂分摊制费'
								  ,qm.ProdLbHours*rate.BurRate2 '分厂分摊制费'

								 ,qm.ProdHours '总厂工时'
								 ,qm.ProdLbHours '分厂工时'
								 ,rate.BurRate1 '总厂制费费率'
								 ,rate.BurRate2 '分厂制费费率'
								 ,rate.LaborRate '总厂人工费率'
								 ,rate.LaborRate2 '分厂人工费率'
                                 ,qm.QtyIssued '本月工时在制约当量'
                                 ,qm.QtymtlIssued '本月物料在制约当量'
                                 ,qm.QtysubIssued '本月外包在制约当量'
                                ,qm.WipReceivedQty_all '本月产成品入库数量'

								  ,qm.WipReceivedMtlCost_all+qm.WipReceivedLaborCost_all+qm.WipReceivedBurCost_all+qm.WipReceivedSubCost_all '本月产成品入库总成本'
                                ,qm.qtyAssembly AS '本月次半成品入库数量'
                                ,qm.MtlCostAssembly AS  '本月次半成品入库成本（物料）' 
                                ,qm.LaborCostAssembly AS  '本月次半成品入库成本(人工)'
                                ,qm.BurCostAssembly AS  '本月次半成品入库成本(制费)'
                                ,qm.SubCostAssembly AS  '本月次半成品入库成本（外包)'
                                  ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=1 then 0 else qm.MtlCostInWip end '期末在制成本（物料）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=1 then 0 else qm.LaborCostInWip end '期末在制成本（人工）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=1 then 0 else qm.BurCostInWip end '期末在制成本（制费）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=1 then 0 else qm.SubCostInWip end '期末在制成本（外包）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=1 then 0 else qm.QtyInWip end '期末在制约当量'
				,case when GuanBiDaiJie=0 then 0 else qm.MtlCostInWip end '关闭待结成本（物料）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=0 then 0 else qm.LaborCostInWip end '关闭待结成本（人工）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=0 then 0 else qm.BurCostInWip end '关闭待结成本（制费）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=0 then 0 else qm.SubCostInWip end '关闭待结成本（外包）'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=0 then 0 else qm.QtyInWip end '关闭待结约当量'                               
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=0 then 0 else qm.QtymtlInWip end '期末物料在制约当量'
                                 ,case when GuanBiDaiJie=0 then 0 else qm.QtysubInWip end '期末外包在制约当量'
				,case when jh.JobClosed=1 then mf.MFDate  else null end  as '最后入库日期'
				,od.mprice,h.CurrencyCode 
                        FROM dbo.QiMoJob_Exception qm
                        LEFT JOIN  ERP.JOBHEAD jh on jh.company = qm.company and jh.jobnum = qm.jobnum 
						left join 
								(select Company,JobNum,max(trandate) as MFDate
								from erp.PartTran
								where TranType in ('mfg-stk','mfg-cus') 
								group by Company,JobNum)mf on qm.Company=mf.Company and qm.JobNum=mf.JobNum
						left join 
								(select Company,JobNum,sum(TranQty) as wcQTY
								from erp.PartTran
								where TranType in ('mfg-stk','mfg-cus')  and AssemblySeq=0
								group by Company,JobNum)mf1 on qm.Company=mf1.Company and qm.JobNum=mf1.JobNum
						left join erp.part part on part.PartNum=qm.PartNum and qm.Company=part.Company
						left join erp.PartClass pc on pc.Company=qm.Company and part.ClassID=pc.ClassID
						left join erp.ProdGrup pg on jh.company=pg.company and jh.ProdCode=pg.ProdCode  
						left join (select lb.company,lb.jobnum,sum(case when (isnull(jo.RunQty,0)*isnull(jo.EstProdHours,0))=0 then 0 else
				isnull(LaborQty,0)/isnull(jo.RunQty,0)*isnull(jo.EstProdHours,0) end) bggs from erp.labordtl lb left join joboper jo on lb.company=jo.company and  lb.JobNum=jo.JobNum and lb.Company=jo.Company
				and lb.AssemblySeq=jo.AssemblySeq and lb.OprSeq=jo.OprSeq where CONVERT(VARCHAR(7),PayrollDate,120)>=CONVERT(VARCHAR(7),@begindate,120) and
				 CONVERT(VARCHAR(7),PayrollDate,120)<=CONVERT(VARCHAR(7),@enddate,120) group by lb.company,lb.jobnum) bg on 
						qm.company=bg.company and qm.jobnum=bg.jobnum 
			left join qimorate rate on qm.company=rate.company and qm.year=rate.year and qm.month=rate.month 
			left join (select max(ordernum) as modn,company,partnum,RevisionNum from orderdtl group by company,partnum,RevisionNum ) odn on qm.company=odn.company and qm.partnum=odn.partnum  and odn.RevisionNum=jh.RevisionNum 
			left join (select company,ordernum,partnum,RevisionNum,max(docunitprice) as mprice from erp.orderdtl group by company,ordernum,partnum,RevisionNum) od on odn.company=od.company and odn.modn=od.ordernum and odn.partnum=od.partnum  and odn.RevisionNum=od.RevisionNum 
			left join erp.orderhed h on od.company=h.company and od.ordernum=h.ordernum 
                        WHERE qm.company =@Company  
            AND  REPLACE(str(qm.YEAR),' ','')+'-'+(case when REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','')<10 then '0'+REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','') else REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','') end )  >=convert(varchar(7),@begindate,120) 
                        AND   REPLACE(str(qm.YEAR),' ','')+'-'+(case when REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','')<10 then '0'+REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','') else REPLACE(str(qm.MONTH ),' ','') end )<=convert(varchar(7),@enddate,120)  and jh.jobtype='mfg'
) ttttt
order by  年,月

SELECT convert(VARCHAR(100),a.date20,23) AS date20,
        CASE WHEN a.JobNum  LIKE '%W%' THEN N'维修'
       ELSE  N'新开' END AS ddfl,sum(a.RunQty) AS wgl
                     from JobOper A
       LEFT JOIN erp.JobAsmbl A3 ON (A.JobNum=A3.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=A3.AssemblySeq AND A.Company=A3.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.JobMtl A4 ON(a3.JobNum=a4.JobNum and a3.AssemblySeq=a4.AssemblySeq AND a3.Company= a4.Company  )
	   LEFT JOIN JobHead B ON (A.JobNum=B.JobNum AND A.Company=B.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.OpMaster C ON (A.OpCode=C.OpCode AND A.Company=C.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.JobOpDtl D ON (A.JobNum=D.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=D.AssemblySeq AND A.OprSeq=D.OprSeq AND A.Company=D.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.ResourceGroup E ON (D.ResourceGrpID=E.ResourceGrpID AND D.Company=E.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN erp.LaborDtl f ON (f.JobNum= a.JobNum AND f.AssemblySeq = a.AssemblySeq AND f.OprSeq= a.OprSeq AND f.Company = a.company)
       LEFT JOIN erp.EmpBasic AS g
ON g.EmpID = f.EmployeeNum AND g.Company = f.Company
       wHERE A.Company ='jctimes'  and B.ReqDueDate >='2021-6-1' and a.checkbox01 = 0
and a.OpCode IN ('140') and a.OpComplete ='1'   AND A.date20 >=(getdate()-15)
GROUP BY convert(VARCHAR(100),a.date20,23),
        CASE WHEN a.JobNum  LIKE '%W%' THEN N'维修'
       ELSE  N'新开' END

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
declare @year1 varchar(20)='2024'
declare @month1 varchar(20)='10'

${ if(len(year1) == 0,""," set @year1 = '"+ year1+"' ")}
${ if(len(month1) == 0,""," set @month1 = '"+ month1+"' ")}
declare @a datetime =@year1+'-'+right('00'+@month1,2)+'-01'
declare @b datetime =  DATEADD(s,-1,DATEADD(mm, DATEDIFF(m,0,@a)+1,0))  

	select a.Company,a.OrderNum,b.OrderLine,b.PartNum,a.EntryPerson,b.SalesCatID,b.Character03,a.OrderDate,b.RequestDate
	,b.LineDesc,b.OrderQty ,h.ProdCode  ,h.ClassID,c.JobNum
	into #AAA
	from OrderHed a 
	inner join OrderDtl b on a.Company=b.Company and a.OrderNum=b.OrderNum
	left join erp.JobProd c on c.Company=a.Company and c.OrderNum=a.OrderNum and c.OrderLine=B.OrderLine
	inner join erp.Part h on a.Company=h.Company and b.PartNum=h.PartNum
	inner join erp.ProdGrup i on i.Company = h.Company and h.ProdCode=i.ProdCode
	inner join erp.SalesCat j on j.Company=a.Company and j.SalesCatID=b.SalesCatID
	inner join erp.OrderRel g on  g.Company=a.Company and g.OrderNum=a.OrderNum and g.OrderLine=b.OrderLine
	inner join erp.UserComp u on u.Company=a.Company and u.DcdUserID=a.EntryPerson
	where (convert(varchar(10),b.RequestDate,120) >=@a and  convert(varchar(10),b.RequestDate,120) <=@b)
	and  a.Character03 not  in (N'取消',N'暂停' )
	and a.Company = 'jctimes' 
	and b.PartNum not like '%-100'
	and h.ProdCode not in ('P501','401','402','403','404','0905','YF01','0910','091020','091031','090101','091001')
	and h.ClassID not in ('0921','0922','0924','0925')
	and a.CustNum <>839086

select  
(count(1) -sum(case when datediff(day,a.RequestDate,isnull(isnull(k1.Date19,d.JobCompletionDate) ,getdate())) >0 then  1 else 0 end))*1.00 /count(1) as 及时率
from #AAA a
left join (
	select JobNum,PartNum ,Company,row_number() over(partition by JobNum order by Company desc) No
	from erp.JobHead 
)c on c.PartNum=a.PartNum and c.No=1
inner join erp.JobHead d on d.Company=c.Company and  c.JobNum=d.JobNum  
left join ( --模体最新完工时间
	select JobNum,max(Date19) Date19 
	from JobOper 
	where  AssemblySeq=0  and CheckBox01=0   and LaborEntryMethod='T'
	group by JobNum
) k1 on  d.JobNum = k1.JobNum  --c.Company = k1.Company and
where 1=1  and a.Company = 'jctimes' 
and  d.JobCode = '2'
and a.PartNum not like '%-100'
and a.ProdCode not in ('P501','401','402','403','404','0905','YF01','0910','091020','091031','090101','091001')
and a.ClassID not in ('0921','0922','0924','0925')
 and d.JobNum NOT LIKE '%w%'

DROP TABLE #AAA

select

	--[JobOper]A.[AssemblySeq]A as [JobOper_AssemblySeq]A,
	--[JobOper]A.[EstProdHours]A as [JobOper_EstProdHours]A,
	--[JobOper]A.[StartDate]A as [JobOper_StartDate]A,
	--[JobOper]A.[DueDate]A as [JobOper_DueDate]A,
	--[JobOper]A.[RunQty]A as [JobOper_RunQty]A,
	--[JobOper]A.[QtyCompleted]A as [JobOper_QtyCompleted]A,
	--[JobOper]A.[EstSetHoursPerMch]A as [JobOper_EstSetHoursPerMch]A,
	--[JobOper]A.[LoadHour]A as [JobOper_LoadHour]A,
	--[JobOper]A.[OpCode]A as [JobOper_OpCode]A,
	--[Part]A.[ProdCode]A as [Part_ProdCode]A,
	--[JobOper]A.[LaborEntryMethod]A as [JobOper_LaborEntryMethod]A,
	--[JobOper]A.[Date01]A as [JobOper_Date01]A,
	--[JobOper]A.[Date02]A as [JobOper_Date02]A,
	--[JobOper]A.[Date20]A as [JobOper_Date20]A,
	--[JobOper]A.[ActProdHours]A as [JobOper_ActProdHours]A,
	--[OrderHed]A.[EntryPerson]A as [OrderHed_EntryPerson]A,
	--[OrderHed]A.[RequestDate]A as [OrderHed_RequestDate]A,
	--((case when  JobOper.OpComplete = 1  then  '完工'  else  (case when (JobOper.OpComplete = 0  and not ((JobOper.LastLaborDate) is null))  then  '加工中'  else  '未完工' end) end)) as [Calculated_s2]A,
	--[JobHead]A.[Company]A as [JobHead_Company]A,
	
	--[LaborDtl]A.[ClockInDate]A as [LaborDtl_ClockInDate]A,
	--[LaborDtl]A.[EmployeeNum]A as [LaborDtl_EmployeeNum]A,
	--[EmpBasic]A.[Name]A as [EmpBasic_Name]A,
	--[JobHead]A.[ReqDueDate]A as [JobHead_ReqDueDate]A,
	--[JobHead]A.[JobCode]A as [JobHead_JobCode]A,
	--[JobHead]A.[JobClosed]A as [JobHead_JobClosed]A,
	--[JobHead]A.[JobComplete]A as [JobHead_JobComplete]A,
	--[JobHead]A.[ClosedDate]A as [JobHead_ClosedDate]A,
	--[JobHead]A.[ProdCode]A as [JobHead_ProdCode]A,
	
	a.syb,
	left([LaborDtl]A.[ApprovedDate]A,7)月份,
	[JobProd]A.[OrderNum]A as 订单编号,
	[JobHead]A.[PartNum]A as 物料编号,
	[JobOper]A.[JobNum]A as 工单编号,
	[LaborDtl]A.[ApprovedDate]A as 完工日期,
	[OrderDtl]A.[RequestDate]A as 完工期限,
	(datediff(day, OrderDtl.RequestDate, LaborDtl.ApprovedDate)) as 延期天数	
from Erp.JobHead as JobHead
inner join  JobOper as JobOper on 
	JobHead.Company = JobOper.Company
	and JobHead.JobNum = JobOper.JobNum
inner join Erp.LaborDtl as LaborDtl on 
	JobOper.Company = LaborDtl.Company
	and JobOper.JobNum = LaborDtl.JobNum
	and JobOper.AssemblySeq = LaborDtl.AssemblySeq
	and JobOper.OprSeq = LaborDtl.OprSeq
inner join Erp.EmpBasic as EmpBasic on 
	LaborDtl.Company = EmpBasic.Company
	and LaborDtl.EmployeeNum = EmpBasic.EmpID
inner join Erp.Part as Part on 
	JobHead.Company = Part.Company
	and JobHead.PartNum = Part.PartNum
inner join Erp.JobProd as JobProd on 
	JobHead.Company = JobProd.Company
	and JobHead.JobNum = JobProd.JobNum
left outer join Erp.OrderHed as OrderHed on 
	JobProd.Company = OrderHed.Company
	and JobProd.OrderNum = OrderHed.OrderNum
left outer join Erp.OrderDtl as OrderDtl on 
	JobProd.Company = OrderDtl.Company
	and JobProd.OrderNum = OrderDtl.OrderNum
	and JobProd.OrderLine = OrderDtl.OrderLine
left outer join(
	select a.OrderNum ,isnull(b.syb,N'配件事业部') syb
        from OrderHed a
        left join (
                select distinct Company, OrderNum
                ,case when ProdCode in ('0910','401') then N'平模事业部'
                when ProdCode in ('091020','403') then N'圆模事业部'
                when ProdCode in ('091031','404') then N'涂布事业部'
                end as syb
                from OrderDtl 
                where ProdCode in ('0910','091020','091031','401','403','404')
        ) b on a.Company = b.Company and a.OrderNum = b.OrderNum
) a on a.OrderNum=OrderDtl.OrderNum
where (JobHead.Company = 'jctimes'  and JobHead.CreateDate >= dateadd (year, -2, getdate())) and [OrderHed]A.[EntryPerson]A like 'jcyxb%' and [JobOper]A.[OpCode]A like 'CJ-ZJ' and [JobHead]A.[JobCode]A =2 and [JobHead]A.[ProdCode]A <>'YF01' and [LaborDtl]A.[ApprovedDate]A >='2025-01-01' and [LaborDtl]A.[ApprovedDate]A <='2025-12-31'
and a.syb=N'配件事业部'
and datediff(day, OrderDtl.RequestDate, LaborDtl.ApprovedDate)>0
order by a.syb,left([LaborDtl]A.[ApprovedDate]A,7)

declare @b datetime ='2023-12-31'
${ if(len(date1) == 0,""," set @a = '"+ date1+"' ")}
${ if(len(date2) == 0,""," set @b = '"+ date2+"' ")}

select left(b.TranDate,7) as TranDate , 1 as TranQty
from erp.JobHead a
LEFT JOIN ERP.PART C ON A.PARTNUM =C.PARTNUM AND A.Company =C.Company
inner join (
	select Company ,JobNum,sum(TranQty) as TranQty,max(TranDate) as TranDate
	from erp.PartTran a where a.TranType='MFG-STK'  and AssemblySeq=0
	group by Company ,JobNum
) b on a.JobNum=b.JobNum and a.Company=b.Company and b.TranQty>0
left join ( 
    select    partnum,Company,character01,ROW_NUMBER()  OVER( PARTITION BY    partnum ORDER BY partnum, ApprovedDate DESC) NO from PartRev  WHERE Character01<>''
    ) l ON a.PartNum=l.PARTNUM AND a.Company=l.Company  and l.no=1
where (c.ProdCode  in ('0910' ) or C.ClassID IN ('901')) and a.JobNum NOT LIKE '%w%' and ISNULL(l.Character01,'')<>'s' and a.PartNum not like 'jk%'
and  convert(varchar(10),b.TranDate,120) >=@a and  convert(varchar(10),b.TranDate,120) <=@b
order by   b.TranDate

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
select   a.PartNum ,c.PartDescription ,b.Description,k.Description  qz,i.Description binname ,OnhandQty ,(case when isnull(d.rkdate,'')='' then pddate else rkdate end) rkdate,
g.Name ,DATEDIFF(DAY,(case when isnull(rkdate,'')=''   then pddate else rkdate end)  ,GETDATE ())/30 kl,
(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY,(case when isnull(rkdate,'')=''   then pddate else rkdate end)  ,GETDATE ())/30 <1 then N'1月以内'
  WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY,(case when isnull(rkdate,'')=''   then pddate else rkdate end)  ,GETDATE ())/30 >=1  
  AND DATEDIFF(DAY,(case when isnull(rkdate,'')=''   then pddate else rkdate end)  ,GETDATE ())/30 <=3  then N'1月以上'
  WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY,(case when isnull(rkdate,'')=''   then pddate else rkdate end)  ,GETDATE ())/30 >=3  
  AND DATEDIFF(DAY,(case when isnull(rkdate,'')=''   then pddate else rkdate end)  ,GETDATE ())/30 <6  then N'3月以上'
  WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY,(case when isnull(rkdate,'')=''   then pddate else rkdate end)  ,GETDATE ())/30 >=6   then N'6月以上' else '' end ) KLYF
from 
Erp.PartBin a inner join Erp.Warehse b on a.WarehouseCode =b.WarehouseCode  and a.Company =b.Company 
inner join Erp.Part c on a.PartNum =c.PartNum and a.Company =c.Company 
inner join Erp.ProdGrup k on c.ProdCode =k.ProdCode and c.Company =k.Company 
left join Erp.WhseBin i on a.BinNum =i.BinNum and a.Company =i.Company  and i.WarehouseCode =b.WarehouseCode 
left join 
(select JobNum ,a.PartNum ,a.TranDate  rkdate,a.Company  from Erp.PartTran a inner join 
(
select  partnum,Company ,MAX(TranDate ) rkdate from Erp.PartTran where TranType ='MFG-STK' and TranQty >0 group by PartNum ,Company  ) m 
on m.Company =a.Company and m.PartNum =a.PartNum and a.TranDate=rkdate where  TranType ='MFG-STK' 
  ) d on d.PartNum =a.PartNum and d.Company =a.Company 

left join 
(select JobNum ,a.PartNum ,a.TranDate  pddate,a.Company  from Erp.PartTran a inner join 
(
select  partnum,Company ,MAX(TranDate ) rkdate from Erp.PartTran where TranType ='ADJ-QTY' and TranQty >0 group by PartNum ,Company  ) m 
on m.Company =a.Company and m.PartNum =a.PartNum and a.TranDate=rkdate where  TranType ='ADJ-QTY' 
  ) j on j.PartNum =a.PartNum and j.Company =a.Company 

 left join Erp.JobProd h on h.Company =d.Company and h.PartNum =d.PartNum and h.JobNum =d.JobNum  
LEFT join Erp.OrderDtl e on h.PartNum =e.PartNum and h.Company =e.Company and h.OrderNum =e.OrderNum and h.OrderLine =e.OrderLine 
LEFT  join Erp.OrderHed f on e.OrderNum =f.OrderNum and e.Company =f.Company
LEFT  join Erp.UserFile g on f.EntryPerson=g.DcdUserID  
where OnhandQty >0 and b.Description like N'%-成品仓%' and a.Company ='jctimes'

order by kl ,a.PartNum

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
declare @Year int 
declare @Month int 
select @Year = max(Year) from QiMoDanJia where company='jctimes'
select @Month = max(Month) from QiMoDanJia where Year = @Year and company='jctimes'

select  ordernum ,PartNum ,LineDesc , case when charindex(N'自动',LineDesc)>0 or charindex(N'模内共挤',LineDesc)>0 then N'模内共挤/自动'
 when charindex(N'调节器',LineDesc)>0 then N'机械臂'
else  N'普通产品'  end  FL,syb
,a.OrderDate 下单日期
,客户名称,发货日期
,case when ml<0.3 then N'30%以下'
 when ml>=0.3 and ml<0.5 then N'30%以上'
 when ml>=0.5 and ml<0.7 then N'50%以上'
 when ml>=0.7 and ml<1 then N'70%以上'
 when ml>=1   then N'100%' end as 毛利级别,Saler ,cb ,je ,ml 毛利率 ,客户类型,年月,是否入库,xmfzr,区域及负责人,CustID
 into #aaa
from
( SELECT a.OrderNum,a.OrderDate,b.PartNum,p.PartDescription LineDesc,
case when '${sdate}'<>'' AND '${edate}'<>''  then  left(a.OrderDate,7)  WHEN   '${thsdate}'<>'' AND '${thedate}'<>'' then left(g.TranDate,7) ELSE '' END 年月,
--left(a.OrderDate,7) 年月,
syb,(case when b.DocInUnitPrice=0 then b.DocUnitPrice  else b.DocInUnitPrice end/1.13
	-isnull((c.MtlUnitCost+c.LaborUnitCost+c.BurUnitCost+c.SubUnitCost),0))/(case when b.DocInUnitPrice=0 then  b.DocUnitPrice  else b.DocInUnitPrice end/1.13)   ml
	,b.OrderQty*case when b.DocInUnitPrice=0 then  b.DocUnitPrice  else b.DocInUnitPrice end/1.13 as je 
	,ISNULL((c.MtlUnitCost+c.LaborUnitCost+c.BurUnitCost+c.SubUnitCost),0) as cb
	--,case when e.EstDate >='2025-01-01' then N'新客户' else N'老客户' end as 客户类型
	--,case when f.OrderDate<='2023-06-30' or isnull(f.EstDate,getdate())>='2025-01-01' then N'新客户' else N'老客户' end  客户类型
	,case when cn.CustNum is not null then N'新客户' else N'老客户' end  客户类型
	--,case when  e.CustID ='70480' then a.Character02  else e.Character03 end Saler
	,case          
	when e.CustID ='70833' then a.Character02  
	when e.Character03 in (N'晋尚崇',N'贺仁华',N'胡智明',N'胡成威',N'梁焕',N'王锦峰',N'王坤',N'王米友',N'王直涛',N'吴峰',N'熊鹏',N'赵振越',N'周佳豪') then  a.Character02   -- 销售代表如为售后人员，归给销售人员（即项目负责人）
	else e.Character03 end Saler  
	,a.Character02 xmfzr
	,case 
	when charindex(N'福建',e.State+e.City)>0 or   charindex(N'汕头',e.State+e.City)>0  then N'福建、汕头【林晨】'
	when charindex(N'湖北',e.State+e.City)>0 or   charindex(N'安徽',e.State+e.City)>0 or charindex(N'四川',e.State+e.City)>0 or   charindex(N'重庆',e.State+e.City)>0  then N'湖北、安徽、四川、重庆【陈挺】'
	when charindex(N'山东',e.State+e.City)>0 or   charindex(N'河北',e.State+e.City)>0 or charindex(N'辽宁',e.State+e.City)>0 or   charindex(N'吉林',e.State+e.City)>0  then N'山东、河北、辽宁、吉林【洪东】'
	when charindex(N'上海',e.State+e.City)>0 or   charindex(N'苏州',e.State+e.City)>0 then N'上海、苏州【王国引】'
	when charindex(N'浙江',e.State+e.City)>0 or   charindex(N'江西',e.State+e.City)>0 or   charindex(N'湖南',e.State+e.City)>0 then N'浙江、江西、湖南【范海亚】'
	when  charindex(N'江苏',e.State+e.City)>0 and charindex(N'苏州',e.State+e.City)=0 then N'江苏区域(不含苏州)【耿洪亮】'
	when  charindex(N'广东',e.State+e.City)>0 and charindex(N'汕头',e.State+e.City)=0 then N'广东除汕头【郭君华、杨龙】'
	when a.Character02=N'陈祥运' then N''
	else N'其他' end as 区域及负责人
	, case when c.PartNum is null then N'否' else N'是'  end 是否入库
	,e.Name 客户名称,e.CustID
	,g.TranDate 发货日期
	FROM OrderHed A
	INNER JOIN ERP.OrderDtl B ON A.Company=b.Company and a.OrderNum=b.OrderNum
	inner join erp.Part p on p.Company=b.Company and p.PartNum=b.PartNum
	inner join Customer e on e.Company=a.Company and e.CustNum =a.CustNum
	left join QiMoDanJia c on c.Company=b.Company and c.PartNum=b.PartNum and Month=@Month and Year=@Year
	left JOIN ERP.ProdGrup D ON D.ProdCode=B.ProdCode AND D.Company=B.Company
	left join (
		select a.CustNum,a.EstDate ,OrderDate,OrderNum,row_number() over(partition by a.CustNum,a.EstDate order by OrderDate desc) No
		from erp.Customer a
		inner join OrderHed b on a.Company=b.Company and a.CustNum=b.CustNum
		where b.OrderDate <'2026-01-01' and b.EntryPerson not like 'jcshb%'
	 )f on f.CustNum=a.CustNum and f.No=1
	 left join (
		select OrderNum,OrderLine,max(a.TranDate) TranDate,sum(TranQty) TranQty
		from erp.PartTran a
		where Company ='jctimes' and TranType = 'STK-CUS'
		group by OrderNum,OrderLine
	 )g on g.OrderNum=b.OrderNum and g.OrderLine=b.OrderLine and TranQty>0
	 left join (
	select a.OrderNum , isnull(b.syb,N'配件事业部') syb
	from OrderHed a
	left join (
		select distinct a.Company, a.OrderNum
		,case when a.ProdCode in ('0910','401','P20') then N'平模事业部'
		when charindex(N'平模',c.Description)>0 then N'平模事业部'
		when a.ProdCode in ('091020','403') then N'圆模事业部'
		when charindex(N'圆模',c.Description)>0 then N'圆模事业部'
		when a.ProdCode in ('091031','404') then N'涂布事业部'
		when charindex(N'涂布',c.Description)>0 then N'涂布事业部'
		end as syb
		from OrderDtl a
		inner join erp.part b on a.PartNum=b.PartNum and a.Company=b.Company
		inner join erp.PartClass c on c.ClassID=b.ClassID
		where a.ProdCode in ('0910','091020','091031','401','403','404','P20') or charindex(N'平模',c.Description)>0
		or charindex(N'圆模',c.Description)>0 or charindex(N'涂布',c.Description)>0
	) b on a.Company = b.Company and a.OrderNum = b.OrderNum
) h on h.OrderNum=a.OrderNum 
	 left join (
		select  CustNum
		from  Customer a
		where Company ='jctimes' and  CustNum in ( ---25年以后下了新订单
			select CustNum from OrderHed where EntryPerson not like 'jcshb%' and OrderDate >='2026-01-01'
		) and CustNum not in (
			select CustNum from OrderHed where EntryPerson not like 'jcshb%' and OrderDate >='2024-06-30' and OrderDate <'2026-01-01'
		)
	 )cn on cn.CustNum=a.CustNum
	where a.Company = 'jctimes' and a.OrderDate>='2025-01-01'   and a.Character02<>''
	and  a.OrderDate<'2027-01-01'
	and case when b.DocInUnitPrice=0 then  b.DocUnitPrice else  b.DocInUnitPrice  end >0 and a.entryperson not like 'jcshb%'
	and  a.Character02   in (N'唐莉娜',N'蔡金枝',N'何雅赛',N'华丽莎',N'黄雅婷',N'于雅莎' )
		${ if(len(是否入库) == 0,""," and case when c.PartNum is null then N'否' else N'是'  end = N'"+ 是否入库+"' ")}
		${ if(len(Cust) == 0,""," and e.Name like  N'%"+ Cust+"%' ")}
		${ if(len(是否提货) == 0,""," and case when g.TranDate is null then N'否' else N'是'  end = N'"+ 是否提货+"' ")}
		${ if(len(sdate) == 0,"","  and a.OrderDate >= cast('"+ sdate+"'+'-01' as datetime) ")}
		${ if(len(edate) == 0,"","  and a.OrderDate < dateadd(month ,1,cast('"+ edate+"'+'-01' as datetime) )")}
		${ if(len(thsdate) == 0,"","  and g.TranDate >= cast('"+ thsdate+"'+'-01' as datetime) ")}
		${ if(len(thedate) == 0,"","  and g.TranDate < dateadd(month ,1,cast('"+ thedate+"'+'-01' as datetime) )")}
	${ if(len(人员) == 0,""," and case   when e.CustID ='70833' then a.Character02  
		when e.Character03 in (N'晋尚崇',N'贺仁华',N'胡智明',N'胡成威',N'梁焕',N'王锦峰',N'王坤',N'王米友',N'王直涛',N'吴峰',N'熊鹏',N'赵振越',N'周佳豪') then  a.Character02   -- 销售代表如为售后人员，归给销售人员（即项目负责人）
		else e.Character03 end = N'"+ 人员+"' ")}
	${ if(len(项目负责人) == 0,""," and a.Character02 = N'"+ 项目负责人+"' ")}
) a 

select a.订单,a.产品,a.描述,a.销售负责人,a.年月,a.产品类型
,a.金额,a.金额*1.13 含税金额,a.成本,a.毛利级别,a.毛利率,a.客户类型,a.客户类型比例,客户名称,发货日期,下单日期
,a.客户类型比例*a.提成比例 as 最终提成比例
,a.金额*1.13*a.客户类型比例*a.提成比例 as 提成金额,left(a.年月,4) 年 
,是否入库,xmfzr,a.区域及负责人
from (
	 select SYB,ordernum 订单
	,PartNum 产品
	,LineDesc 描述,Saler 销售负责人,年月,FL 产品类型,je 金额,cb 成本,毛利级别,毛利率,客户类型,是否入库,客户名称,发货日期,下单日期  
	,case  
	  when    charindex(N'调节器',LineDesc)>0 then 0.04 -- 调节器  按销售额的3%
	  when charindex(N'自动',LineDesc)>0  or  charindex(N'模内共挤',LineDesc)>0 then 0.025 -- 自动模头 模内共挤模头 2.5%
	 else 0.02 end 提成比例
	 ,1 客户类型比例,xmfzr,区域及负责人
	 from #aaa 
) a 
where 1=1 --a.销售负责人<>N'崔钟南'
${ if(len(事业部) == 0,""," and case when a.产品类型 in (N'平模事业部薄膜产品线产品',N'平模事业部片板产品线产品') then N'平模事业部' 
when a.产品类型 in (N'配件事业部产品') then N'配件事业部'
when a.产品类型 in (N'圆模事业部产品',N'',N'') then N'圆模事业部' when a.产品类型 in (N'涂布事业部产品',N'',N'') then N'涂布事业部'  end in ( N'"+ 事业部+"' ) ")}
${ if(len(是否特殊) == 0,""," and case when a.销售负责人=a.xmfzr then N'否' else N'是'  end = N'"+ 是否特殊+"' ")}
order by  a.销售负责人

 drop table #aaa  ---明细

businessFamilies.representativeSql:
declare @Company varchar(100)='jctimes',
 @Year int,
 @Month int
 select  @Year=max(year) from  dbo.QiMoDanJia
 select  @Month=max(Month) from  dbo.QiMoDanJia where Year=@Year

 select  b.Company, b.PartNum,b.LineDesc,c.OrderDate,b.OrderNum,b.OrderLine,b.RequestDate,f.TranDate ,g.Description 群组,e.JobNum ,i.Name
 --, a.Year, a.Month
 ,isnull( a.MtlUnitCost,0)+isnull(a1.ExtCost,0) 料费, a.LaborUnitCost 人工, a.BurUnitCost 制费, a.SubUnitCost 外包
 ,isnull(a.MtlUnitCost+ a.LaborUnitCost+ a.BurUnitCost+ a.SubUnitCost,0)+isnull(a1.ExtCost,0) as 总成本
 ,case when c.TaxRegionCode ='' then b.DocUnitPrice else b.DocInUnitPrice end/1.13 as 未税单价
 ,case when c.TaxRegionCode ='' then b.DocUnitPrice else b.DocInUnitPrice end as 含税单价
 ,h.gs
,case when b.SalesCatID = '0002' then N'维修产品' when b.SalesCatID = '0003' then N'零售产品'  else N'新开产品' end as 类型
,c.Character02 项目负责人
into #aaa
  from  erp.OrderDtl b 
    left join  QiMoDanJia a  on a.Company=b.Company and a.PartNum=b.PartNum  and  a.Year=@Year and a.Month=@Month 
   inner join  OrderHed c on c.Company=b.Company and c.OrderNum=b.OrderNum 
   inner  join erp.Customer i on i.Company=c.Company and c.CustNum=i.CustNum  
   left join (
	select REPLACE(PartNum,'-100','') PartNum,SUM(ExtCost) ExtCost
	from erp.parttran 
	where PartNum like '%-100' and TranType = 'MFG-CUS' AND Company='JCTIMES' and TranDate>='2024-01-01'
	GROUP BY REPLACE(PartNum,'-100','')
   ) a1 on a1.PartNum=b.PartNum
  -- and i.Name like   N'%上海鑫迪机械有限公司%'
  inner join erp.Part d on d.Company=b.Company and d.PartNum=b.PartNum
  left join erp.JobProd e on e.Company=b.Company and e.OrderNum=b.OrderNum and e.OrderLine=b.OrderLine
  left join (
	select Company ,JobNum,max(TranDate) TranDate,sum(TranQty) TranQty
	from erp.parttran 
	where TranType='mfg-stk' and AssemblySeq=0 and TranDate>='2024-01-01'
	group by  Company ,JobNum
  ) f on f.Company=e.Company and f.JobNum=e.JobNum
  inner join erp.ProdGrup g on g.Company=b.Company and g.ProdCode = b.ProdCode
  left join (
	select a.Company,a.JobNum,sum(a.LaborQty*b.ProdStandard) as gs
	from erp.LaborDtl a
	inner join erp.JobOper b on a.Company=b.Company and a.JobNum=b.JobNum and a.AssemblySeq=b.AssemblySeq and a.OprSeq=b.OprSeq
	group by a.Company,a.JobNum
  ) h on h.Company=e.Company and h.JobNum=e.JobNum
   where b.Company ='jctimes'  and  c.OrderDate>='2024-01-01'  and b.PartNum not like '%-100'
  ${ if(len(order) == 0,"  "," and cast(c.ordernum as varchar(100))  =  N'"+ order+"' ")}
  ${ if(len(PartNum) == 0,"  "," and b.PartNum  =  N'"+ PartNum+"' ")}
  ${ if(len(年份) == 0,"  "," and year(c.OrderDate)  ='"+ 年份+"' ")}
  ${ if(len(Name) == 0,"  "," and  i.Name like  N'%"+ Name+"%' ")}
  ${ if(len(lx) == 0,"  "," and case when b.SalesCatID = '0002' then N'维修产品' when b.SalesCatID = '0003' then N'零售产品'  else N'新开产品' end in (N'"+ lx+"' )  ")}
   ${ if(len(项目负责人) == 0,"  "," and  c.Character02 like  N'%"+ 项目负责人+"%' ")}
  and b.ordernum in (
	select a.OrderNum  
	from OrderHed a
	left join (
		select distinct a.Company, a.OrderNum
		,case when a.ProdCode in ('0910','401','P20') then N'平模事业部'
		when charindex(N'平模',c.Description)>0 then N'平模事业部'
		when a.ProdCode in ('091020','403') then N'圆模事业部'
		when charindex(N'圆模',c.Description)>0 then N'圆模事业部'
		when a.ProdCode in ('091031','404') then N'涂布事业部'
		when charindex(N'涂布',c.Description)>0 then N'涂布事业部'
		end as syb
		from OrderDtl a
		inner join erp.part b on a.PartNum=b.PartNum and a.Company=b.Company
		inner join erp.PartClass c on c.ClassID=b.ClassID
		where a.ProdCode in ('0910','091020','091031','401','403','404','P20') or charindex(N'平模',c.Description)>0
		or charindex(N'圆模',c.Description)>0 or charindex(N'涂布',c.Description)>0
	) b on a.Company = b.Company and a.OrderNum = b.OrderNum
	where isnull(b.syb,N'配件事业部')  in (  N'涂布事业部')
  )
--and case when c.TaxRegionCode ='' then b.DocUnitPrice else b.DocInUnitPrice end/1.13<>0


select  a.Name 客户名称,a.群组,a.PartNum 产品,a.LineDesc 描述,a.OrderDate 订单日期,a.OrderNum 订单号,a.OrderLine 行号,a.RequestDate 合同交期
,a.TranDate 入库日期,a.料费,a.人工,a.外包,a.制费,a.总成本,a.未税单价,a.含税单价
, case when nullif(a.未税单价,0) = 0 then '' else  cast(cast((a.未税单价-a.总成本)*100/nullif(a.未税单价,0) as decimal(18,3)) as varchar(10)) +'%' end 毛利
,a.JobNum 工单,a.gs 工时,a.编号 物料编号,a.描述 物料描述,a.需求数量,a.项目负责人--,a.加权单价,a.交易单价,a.物料料费,a.最低价
from (
	select  e.*,dc.PartNum 编号,dc.Description 描述,dc.RequiredQty 需求数量
	--,de.MtlUnitCost 加权单价,df.MtlUnitCost 交易单价,df.ExtCost 物料料费 ,dg.MtlUnitCost 最低价 
	from #aaa e 
	left join ( SELECT Company,JobNum,PartNum,Description,SUM(RequiredQty) RequiredQty FROM  erp.JobMtl  where RequiredQty>0 GROUP BY Company,JobNum,PartNum,Description)dc on e.Company=dc.Company and e.JobNum=dc.JobNum
) a 
where 1=1   and (a.未税单价-a.总成本)*100/nullif(a.未税单价,0)<10
order by a.Name,a.OrderDate desc,a.OrderNum,a.OrderLine

SELECT  A.ParentPhase,A.SortSeq,A.ProjectID,A.PhaseID,A.Description,A.StartDate,A.DueDate,
A.Number01,a.Number02,A.date20,A.DateComplete,A.PhaseStatus,
CASE WHEN A.PhaseStatus='I' THEN N'加工中' WHEN A.PhaseStatus='C' THEN N'完成' ELSE N'未开始' END AS PhaseStatus,
CASE WHEN A.PhaseStatus='I' THEN N'加工中' 
WHEN (A.PhaseStatus='C'  and A.DateComplete > A.DueDate) THEN N'延期完成' 
WHEN (A.PhaseStatus='C'  and A.DateComplete <= A.DueDate) THEN N'正常完成' 
ELSE N'未开始' END AS fxPhaseStatus,
convert(nvarchar(10),A.Date20,120)+' '+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor(A.Number01/3600) AS CHAR(2))),2)+':'+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor((A.Number01-floor(A.Number01/3600)*3600)/60) AS CHAR(2))),2) AS TDate20,
convert(nvarchar(10),A.DateComplete,120)+' '+ RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor(A.Number02/3600) AS CHAR(2))),2)+':'+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor((A.Number02-floor(A.Number02/3600)*3600)/60) AS CHAR(2))),2) as TDateComplete,
A.PercentComplete,A.Duration,CASE WHEN A.DurationType='D' THEN N'天' ELSE N'小时' END AS DurationType,
A.Character01,B.Description AS pDesc,A.CheckBox20,A.Character10 ,A.Character02,c.Name ,b.StartDate,b.EndDate
FROM ProjPhase A 
INNER JOIN Project B ON (A.ProjectID=B.ProjectID AND A.Company=B.Company) 
LEFT JOIN erp.UserFile c
ON a.Character01 = c.DcdUserID
WHERE A.Company='jctimes'  AND A.PhaseStatus ='C' 
and A.DateComplete >='2020-3-1' and A.DateComplete <='2020-12-31' 
and b.character01 <> '暂停'

demoFilteredFamilies.representativeSql:
Select a.jobnum,a.jobcomplete,a.partDescription , a.reqDueDate ,a.createDate ,b.description,b.partnum,
c.oprseq,c.commentText,c.opcomplete,c.actProdhours ,c.lastLaborDate,c.OpCode,c.Character09,c.Character10,d.BurdenHrs,h.name,
d.LaborHrs,d.EarnedHrs,c.ProdStandard,
c.Date01,c.date02,c.date20,c.opdesc,c.AssemblySeq,d.JCDept,d.EmployeeNum,
e.Description AS jczy,f.Description AS jcbm,
convert(nvarchar(10),c.date20 ,120)+ ' ' +c.Character09 AS jsdate ,
       convert(nvarchar(10),d.clockindate ,120)+ ' ' +d.DspClockInTime AS indate ,
       convert(nvarchar(10),d.ApprovedDate ,120)+ ' ' +d.DspClockOutTime AS outdate ,d.approveddate,(d.clockoutminute-d.clockinminute) as 'jgsj'
from  JobOper As c
left join erp.JobAsmbl As b
on c.jobNum = b.jobNum  AND c.AssemblySeq = b.AssemblySeq AND c.Company = b.Company
left join erp.JobHead As a 
on  c.jobNum = a.jobnum AND c.company = a.company
LEFT JOIN erp.LaborDtl AS d
ON c.JobNum = d.JobNum AND c.AssemblySeq =d.AssemblySeq AND c.OprSeq =d.OprSeq AND c.Company= d.Company
left JOIN  erp."Resource" AS e 
ON e.ResourceID = d.ResourceID and e.Company = d.Company
LEFT JOIN erp.ResourceGroup AS f
ON f.ResourceGrpID = e.ResourceGrpID and f.Company = e.Company
LEFT JOIN erp.EmpBasic AS h 
ON h.EmpID = d.EmployeeNum  AND h.Company = d.Company
where c.Company = 'jctimes' and d.approveddate>='2020-05-01'
AND c.OpComplete ='1'
  ${if (len(要求完工日期大于)==0,"","and d.ApprovedDate>='"+要求完工日期大于+"'")}
 ${if (len(要求完工日期小于)==0,"","and d.ApprovedDate<='"+要求完工日期小于+"'")}
 ${if(len(工序部门)==0,"","and c.opdesc in ('"+工序部门+"')")}
  ${if (len(工单编号)==0,"","and  a.jobnum='"+工单编号+"'")} 
order by c.lastlabordate desc
